evals.prompt: We deployed a code change last Tuesday and now this query is 20x slower. I have the baseline plan from before deploy and the current regression plan. Diff them.
evals.expected_output: Root Cause Summary identifying primary regression (join algorithm change, DOP change, CE version change). Confirmed Stable section showing what did not change. Specific check IDs from C1-C10.

evals.prompt: Diff these two plans. One runs in 100ms, one runs in 15 seconds. They look identical.
evals.expected_output: Identifies subtle differences: memory grant variance, row estimate divergence, parameter values, compile time. Highlights the specific operator where cost diverged.
